abstract: We introduce NeuroVault, a web-based repository designed to streamline the storage, sharing, visualization, and decoding of statistical maps of the human brain. By leveraging modern web technologies, NeuroVault offers an intuitive interface that provides rich data visualizations directly in the browser, eliminating the need for specialized local software. Furthermore, the platform integrates with the Neurosynth database to enable automated cognitive decoding of uploaded maps. All hosted data are accessible through a public REST API, allowing external tools and services to interface with the repository seamlessly. NeuroVault serves as a comprehensive resource for the neuroscience community, particularly for researchers performing meta-analyses and coactivation studies.
